description: Verify Digital Office host rule injection for clean Hermes/OpenClaw installs and guarded behavior for non-clean hosts.

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; ./install.sh --host hermes --target "$tmp/hermes-clean" --no-check >/dev/null; test -f "$tmp/hermes-clean/SOUL.md"; grep -q 'digital-office-managed-entrypoint' "$tmp/hermes-clean/SOUL.md"; ./install.sh --host openclaw --target "$tmp/openclaw-clean" --no-check >/dev/null; test -f "$tmp/openclaw-clean/AGENTS.md"; grep -q 'secretary Agent' "$tmp/openclaw-clean/AGENTS.md"; mkdir -p "$tmp/openclaw-dirty"; printf '# Existing local rules\n' > "$tmp/openclaw-dirty/AGENTS.md"; set +e; ./install.sh --host openclaw --target "$tmp/openclaw-dirty" --no-check > "$tmp/dirty.out" 2> "$tmp/dirty.err"; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; grep -q 'Choose --preserve-existing' "$tmp/dirty.err"; ./install.sh --host openclaw --target "$tmp/openclaw-dirty" --preserve-existing --no-check >/dev/null; grep -q 'Existing local rules' "$tmp/openclaw-dirty/AGENTS.md"; test -f "$tmp/openclaw-dirty/digital-office/AGENTS.md"; ./install.sh --host openclaw --target "$tmp/openclaw-dirty" --overwrite-existing --no-check >/dev/null; grep -q 'digital-office-managed-entrypoint' "$tmp/openclaw-dirty/AGENTS.md"; ls "$tmp/openclaw-dirty"/AGENTS.md.before-digital-office.* >/dev/null
